{% if doc.one_fm_request_for_purchase %} {%- set rfm = frappe.db.get_value("Request for Purchase",doc.one_fm_request_for_purchase,'request_for_material') -%} {%- set rfm_site = frappe.db.get_value("Request for Material",rfm,'site') -%} {%- set rfm_owner = frappe.db.get_value("Request for Material",rfm,'owner') -%} {%- set rfm_type = frappe.db.get_value("Request for Material",rfm,'type') -%} {%- set rfm_purpose = frappe.db.get_value("Request for Material",rfm,'purpose') -%} {%- set rfm_requested_by = frappe.db.get_value("Request for Material",rfm,'requested_by') -%} {% else %} {%- set rfm_site = "" -%} {%- set rfm_owner = "" -%} {%- set rfm_type = "" -%} {%- set rfm_purpose = "" -%} {%- set rfm_requested_by = "" -%} {% endif %} {% if doc.contact_person %} {%- set contact_email = frappe.db.get_value("Contact",doc.contact_person ,'email_id') -%} {%- set supplier_contact_phone = frappe.db.get_value("Contact",doc.contact_person ,'phone') -%} {% else %} {%- set contact_email = "" -%} {%- set supplier_contact_phone = "" -%} {% endif %} {# Delivery Location Logic: custom_place_of_delivery OR (rfm_site if type is Project) #} {% if doc.custom_place_of_delivery %} {%- set delivery_location = doc.custom_place_of_delivery -%} {% elif rfm_type == "Project" and rfm_site %} {%- set delivery_location = rfm_site -%} {% else %} {%- set delivery_location = "" -%} {% endif %} {# Delivery Contact Logic: Check if PO is not approved (draft status) and RFM purpose is Issue or Transfer #} {% if doc.docstatus == 0 and (rfm_purpose == "Issue" or rfm_purpose == "Transfer") %} {# If custom_contact_person exists, use it (user has changed it) #} {% if doc.custom_contact_person %} {%- set delivery_contact = doc.custom_contact_person -%} {# Otherwise, fetch full_name from User doctype using requested_by #} {% elif rfm_requested_by %} {%- set delivery_contact = frappe.db.get_value("User", rfm_requested_by, 'full_name') or rfm_requested_by -%} {% else %} {%- set delivery_contact = "" -%} {% endif %} {% else %} {# If PO is approved or RFM purpose is not Issue/Transfer, use custom_contact_person or fallback to rfm_owner #} {%- set delivery_contact = doc.custom_contact_person or rfm_owner or "" -%} {% endif %} {% if doc.contact_person %} {%- set contact_email = frappe.db.get_value("Contact",doc.contact_person ,'email_id') -%} {%- set contact_phone_from_contact = frappe.db.get_value("Contact",doc.contact_person ,'phone') -%} {% else %} {%- set contact_email = "" -%} {%- set contact_phone_from_contact = "" -%} {% endif %} {%- set contact_phone = doc.custom_contact_number or contact_phone_from_contact or "" -%}

NOTES
{{doc.other_conditions or ""}}
TERMS & CONDITIONS

1: All goods must be delivered as per the specifications, quantity, and timeline mentioned in the Purchase Order. Any deviation must be communicated and approved in advance.

2: Failure to submit the invoice within the stipulated time may result in a delay in payment processing.

3: Both the invoice and the delivery note must clearly state the Purchase Order (PO) Number.

4: Payment will be processed as per the agreed terms upon receipt of all required documents and satisfactory delivery of goods.
name: Purchase Order
